messages.message:
Hi Angelique 
Just checking in to see if everything looks good with Option B (Aluminum Frame) and the total door-to-door price of USD 5,141.

If you’re ready, I can prepare the Proforma Invoice (PI) for you today so we can reserve your production slot and arrange shipping to Mandaluyong City. 

Let me know whenever you’re ready — no rush.

Hi Angelique 
Hope you’re having a great day!
Just reaching out to see if you had any questions about Option B or the total door-to-door price I shared earlier.

I’m here to help you plan everything smoothly for your new Pilates studio — whenever you’re ready.
If you’d like, I can also walk you through the setup, timeline, or anything else you need.
